basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released through Advertisement No. 35/2026 on the official website of IISER Pune. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation commensurate with educational qualification(s) and/or experience(s) of the applicant may be considered for applicant(s) having qualification and experience higher than the advertised with the prior approval of the competent authority.

qualification.education_qualification: B. E / B. Tech or equivalent four-year engineering degree in Computer Engineering / Information Technology or related fields from a recognized University or equivalent.
qualification.details: B. E / B. Tech or equivalent four-year engineering degree in Computer Engineering / Information Technology or related fields from a recognized University or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs. 25,000/- + 24% HRA or Rs. 31,000/- + 24% HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IISER Pune to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IISER Pune Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate - I position at IISER Pune is 18th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B. E / B. Tech or an equivalent four-year engineering degree in Computer Engineering / Information Technology or related fields from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate - I position is 35 years. Age relaxation may be considered for candidates with higher qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 31,000/- per month, plus 24% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate - I position at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at IISER Pune.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IISER Pune located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) is located in Pune, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided application link before the last date of 18th June 2026.
